summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CaseDesk AI MVP. Backend APIs fully functional with 26/26 tests passing. Frontend loads correctly but authentication integration needs investigation.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form cannot authenticate with backend-created admin users
integration_issues.details: Backend API setup/init creates admin users successfully, but frontend login fails with 'Invalid credentials'. Suggests session/authentication integration issue between frontend and backend.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (UI loads, forms work, navigation partially works, but auth integration fails)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication integration between frontend and backend. Frontend login form fails to authenticate users created via backend setup API. This blocks testing of authenticated features like dashboard navigation, case management, etc. Need to verify JWT token handling, session management, or CORS configuration.
